description: A Python prototype of a ray tracing renderer (`pytracer`) located at `~/PycharmProjects/pytracer/` is producing visual artifacts including distorted objects, incorrect reflections, and shadow acne. Fix the four math/logic bugs in the renderer affecting the Field of View calculation, Sphere intersection root selection, reflection vector formula, and shadow acne (self-intersection). All tests in `tests/` must pass, and a clean scene must be rendered to `output/render.png`.
